form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Last start raced on speed throughout when 2nd of 11 at this track on April 2 over 2200m, on a slow track; 0.5 len behind Unleash The Beast carrying 57kg at $2.60. The start before that 3rd of 15 at Riccarton Park on March 21 over 1600m, 2 len behind Perlino with 57kg at $9.60. Doesn't need to improve a great deal to take this out.
